data.body: ROOT CAUSE (confirmed + extended): TicketEventRecorder._append (executor.py) passed the raw target id to append_event with neither require_id nor require_not_ghost, and the committer's os.makedirs(exist_ok=True) materialized a phantom CREATE-less dir. NEW finding: a valid ALIAS hit the same gap, writing run-state to a <alias>/ phantom instead of the canonical ticket. FIX (branch worktree-civil-marlin-flare, commit 2d35d867): resolve + ghost-check ONCE on the first append at the recorder chokepoint (covers library/CLI/MCP). Bogus/ghost id now fails fast with zero event files; alias resolves to canonical. Pending PR/merge before close.
